rows.description: of Mr Inman. Balance of his Acc. for the purchase of the Tenements at Bushey
rows.notes: Description visually verified and consolidated from the two physical lines in the image. Amounts visually verified as £3 14s 10d. Gemini-flash extracted the pounds, shillings, and pence, but missed the final '7' and then incorrectly noted it was part of the next line's description. GPT-5-mini missed the leading £3 entirely and misidentified the column for the remaining values. The '7' digit visible after the pence is not a standard fractional value and does not align with typical ledger columns, so it is omitted from the structured amount fields.
rows.english_description: Balance of Mr Inman's account for the purchase of the tenements at Bushey.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance of Mr Inman's account for the purchase of the tenements at Bushey, amounting to £3 14s 10d.

rows.description: of Dr. Shorbridge's Trust. one year's Annuity to Xmas. 1829
rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly identified the amount £220 0s 0d and correctly noted the leading '3' as part of a decorative brace. GPT-5-mini also identified the amount but misread 'Shorbridge' as 'Thornbridge' and the year '1829' as '1821'. Description combined from gemini-flash's split lines and corrected for spelling/year.
rows.english_description: One year's annuity received from Dr Shorbridge's trust to Christmas 1829.
rows.english_description_with_amount: One year's annuity received from Dr Shorbridge's trust to Christmas 1829, amounting to £220 0s 0d.
